market_summary: Global markets remain volatile on March 24, 2026, amid conflicting reports regarding US-Iran tensions. While US markets and Asian benchmarks initially rallied on news of a potential ceasefire, optimism waned after Iran denied direct talks, leading to renewed uncertainty in oil markets.
art_highlight: Art Basel Hong Kong 2026 kicks off preview days on March 25, with 240 galleries and new sectors like 'Echoes' and the Asian debut of digital initiative 'Zero 10'.
